channel.title: Podcasts on Papers
channel.description: AI-generated podcast summaries of books and papers. Each episode is an Audio Overview from NotebookLM, turning complex texts into engaging conversations.
channel.itunes:author: Podcasts on Papers

item.title: Behave: The Biology of Humans at Our Best and Worst
item.description: An AI-generated Audio Overview of Robert Sapolsky's Behave - exploring the biological and neurological roots of human behavior. From split-second neural firings to evolutionary timescales, Sapolsky weaves together neuroscience, endocrinology, and social psychology to understand why we do what we do.

item.title: Forgotten Truth: The Common Vision of the World Religions
item.description: Explore NotebookLM-generated audio overview of Huston Smith book on the universal metaphysical framework underlying world religions.
